input.command:
echo "=== Port Conflict Debugger ==="
echo "Scanning common service ports..."
echo ""
echo "Web server ports:"
for port in 80 443 8080 8443; do
  ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$port " && echo "Port $port: IN USE" || echo "Port $port: available"
done

echo ""
echo "Database ports:"
for port in 3306 5432 6379 27017; do
  ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$port " && echo "Port $port: IN USE" || echo "Port $port: available"
done

echo ""
echo "Port scan complete. See above for conflicts."
